description: Cross-product-line dependency whitelist for Kingdee Cosmic test and refactor checks. Matches downgrade a warning to informational output.
maintainerNote: New entries must include a complete reason explaining why the cross-product-line dependency is intentional.

rules.reason: Tendering shared documents: repc and scm.bid share bidding/opening base data by design.
Tendering supplier relationship: repc evaluation flow depends on scm.ten supplier recruitment data.
Engineering project contract base data is shared with pccs.
Tendering deposit refund uses cash receipt/payment documents.
General ledger and accounts payable are both finance cloud submodules.
General ledger and accounts receivable are both finance cloud submodules.

_examples_negative.comment: Negative example: repc numeric calculation should prefer kd.repc.rebas.common.util.ReDigitalUtil.
